name: ProdigyTeks
description_short: ProdigyTeks is a credit repair provider based in Chicago, Illinois. Rated 4.8/5 with 65 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
ProdigyTeks is a credit repair provider serving clients in Chicago, Illinois. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 65 reviews, ProdigyTeks has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Chicago area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a computer consultant, computer networking service, computer repair service, ProdigyTeks provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Chicago, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. ProdigyTeks operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Chicago, Illinois area who are considering ProdigyTeks should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
